title: Asuka is so hot
wikitext:
[]: Asuka is so hot... Post by Stryker » Tue Apr 12, 2011 6:53 pm Well, considering how the "Asuka is Hot" thread is locked, and Mr. Tines said it was okay to make a new one (as long as it remained on emphasis), I have made one, posing as kinda like a "Yo momma is so fat" joke... thing, but has morphed into a "Asuka is so hot" joke (feel free to discuss her hotness in other ways, but read below). If this shoots off into succession Now, lets get this straight: THIS IS NOT AN IMAGE DUMP THREAD. There was a thread made specifically for this, go there instead. Lets begin: Asuka is so hot, she melted lava. Yeah, that was bad. Outdo me.

If this shoots off into succession Now, lets get this straight: THIS IS NOT AN IMAGE DUMP THREAD. There was a thread made specifically for this, go there instead. Lets begin: Asuka is so hot, she melted lava. Yeah, that was bad. Outdo me.

[]: Re: Asuka is so hot... Post by Stryker » Tue Apr 12, 2011 8:14 pm hmm, perhaps we could converse about her physical attributes which make each of us individuals here have a particular attraction to her. Now that i think of it, i can't decide...hair, face, figure??

[]: Post by symbv » Tue Apr 12, 2011 8:22 pm Bold red text is not only restricted for mods use? On topic: Asuka is hot because she wears hot color

[]: Post by Stryker » Tue Apr 12, 2011 8:27 pm Asuka is so hot, she approached a jalapeño and it spontaneously combusted.

[]: Post by Azathoth » Tue Apr 12, 2011 8:45 pm juaxoo wrote: Asuka is so hot she made Shinji masturbate to ejaculation while only exposing her chest / upper body

[]: Post by rhfxz1s » Tue Apr 12, 2011 10:02 pm Azathoth wrote: In twenty seconds, too.

[]: Post by Jessemon » Tue Apr 12, 2011 10:52 pm Idk, 20 seconds isn't unreasonable if you are dedicated and already turned on.

[]: Post by LordEvan88 » Tue Apr 12, 2011 10:54 pm juaxoo wrote: Asuka is so hot she made Shinji masturbate to ejaculation while only exposing her chest / upper body

[]: Post by Azathoth » Wed Apr 13, 2011 12:10 am rhfxz1s wrote: Now that you mention it, I never took into account how quickly he came in that scene.

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Apr 13, 2011 2:14 am Asuka's so hot, all of that getup in ep. 10 was just to keep her hotness from combining with the volcano and melting everything within a 10,000 mile radius.

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 13, 2011 2:24 am I dunno about Asuka, but sometimes when I'm looking at Eva-02 I get these weird tingly feelings...

[]: Post by toe mash » Wed Apr 13, 2011 3:18 am Asuka is so hot that her mom mistook a doll for her and then committed suicide. Is that how it's done?

[]: Post by Leighton » Wed Apr 13, 2011 8:54 am Reichu wrote: I dunno about Asuka, but sometimes when I'm looking at Eva-02 I get these weird tingly feelings...

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Apr 13, 2011 9:56 am WTF IS THIS THREAD? I mean, is this gonna be full of stuff similar to "Your mom is so fat/stupid/ect. ____________" posts, with the minor alteration of Asuka being hot? Actually, a "Your mom" thread would be quite applicable to NGE.... Your mom is so dumb, she got lost just trying to cross the street! (Episode 16) Your mom is so fat, she had to eat the last monster that attacked Japan just to hold her until dinner! (Episode 19) Your mom is so stupid, she mistook a giant spear for a penis! (EoE)

[]: Post by Seen » Wed Apr 13, 2011 9:58 am Reichu wrote: I dunno about Asuka, but sometimes when I'm looking at Eva-02 I get these weird tingly feelings...

[]: Post by toe mash » Wed Apr 13, 2011 10:37 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Your mom is so stupid, she mistook a giant spear for a penis! (EoE)

[]: Post by juaxoo » Wed Apr 13, 2011 10:45 am toe mash wrote: More like "Your mom is such a slut that even after she realized it wasn't a penis she still got off on it" amirite?

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Apr 13, 2011 11:31 am juaxoo wrote: Asuka is so hot, but not hot enough for Kaji
